nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear. Low around 54, with temperatures rising to around 62 overnight. South wind around 13 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: Partly sunny. High near 65, with temperatures falling to around 63 in the afternoon. North northwest wind 14 to 25 mph, with gusts as high as 43 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain after 10pm. Mostly cloudy. Low around 39, with temperatures rising to around 41 overnight. Northeast wind 14 to 21 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain before 4pm, then rain and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 50. East northeast wind around 16 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a low around 38. East northeast wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between three quarters and one inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 55. North wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain before 7pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 38. North northeast wind 7 to 10 mph.

nws.name: Friday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain likely after 7am. Partly sunny, with a high near 62. East northeast wind 12 to 18 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain likely. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 34. North northwest wind 14 to 17 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 49. Northwest wind 16 to 22 mph, with gusts as high as 35 mph.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain before 7pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 29. Northwest wind 13 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 55. North northwest wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 34. East wind 6 to 12 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 62. Southwest wind 6 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.
